title: PortfolioEnv step() info dict
description: Schema for the dict returned by PortfolioEnv.step() and PortfolioEnv.reset() (after info_to_json_safe). Source of truth for FR-026 / SC-008 and feature 005/007 consumers.

weights.description: Post-processing weights [NVDA, AMD, TSM, MU, GLD, TLT, CASH]. sum == 1 (tolerance 1e-9). All entries except CASH must satisfy <= position_cap (default 0.4). NOTE: this per-entry cap is enforced by env code (data-model.md §4 step 3 water-filling), NOT by JSON Schema — the schema only constrains [0, 1]; runtime tests in tests/integration/test_action_processing.py verify the cap.

nav.description: Net asset value at end of current step. Initial value = config.initial_nav.

asset_values.description: nav * weights[0:6] for [NVDA, AMD, TSM, MU, GLD, TLT].

slippage_bps.description: config.base_slippage_bps * turnover. Logging only — does not enter reward formula (research R4).

log_return.description: log(nav_t / nav_{t-1}). Equals 0.0 on initial step (FR-016 / Edge Case).

reward_components.description: Three reward components. Constraint: log_return - drawdown_penalty - turnover_penalty == reward (tolerance 1e-9, FR-009).

action_raw.description: Original step() input action. May contain values outside [0, 1] before processing.

action_processed.description: Action after FR-014 pipeline (NaN check / L1 normalize / position cap).

action_renormalized.description: True if L1 normalize step changed the action (sum was not 1 within 1e-6).

position_capped.description: True if any entry in [0:6] exceeded position_cap and was redistributed.

nan_replaced.description: Cumulative count of NaN-to-0.0 substitutions in observation features (FR-012).

is_initial_step.description: True only on the first step() after reset() (current_index == 1).

^[A-Z]+$.description: SHA-256 hex of asset Parquet file (matches 002 metadata).

data_hashes.description: Uppercase ticker -> SHA-256 hex. Keys MUST match config.assets tuple elements byte-for-byte (e.g. 'NVDA','AMD','TSM','MU','GLD','TLT'). Schema-level constraint: pattern '^[A-Z]+$' rejects lowercase. Verified at __init__ (research R6); same dict object returned every step.

skipped_dates.description: Dates skipped due to quality_flag != ok on any stock (research R5). FRED missing_rate does NOT cause skip.
